//: Inherits ESM mode from the root package.json. The earlier comment here cited electron#40719 as a reason to stay on CJS — but the actual files in this folder (main.js, server-process.js, logger.js, scripts/*.js) all use ESM `import` syntax, so CJS was already in conflict with the source and prevented Electron from booting at all. If #40719-style symptoms reappear (main-process crashes on CJS transitive deps), the fallback is to rename these files to .cjs and convert their syntax back to require().
